description_long: This house features a modern Mediterranean-inspired design with a prominent terracotta gable roof and white exterior walls. The front facade showcases a large glass-walled living area with a grid of windows and a double-door entry, flanked by a spacious patio furnished with curved seating and a small pink rug. The structure is multi-leveled, with two main stories and a combination of flat and sloped roof sections. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear and side elevations reveal additional entry points, a small balcony, and a mix of window sizes. The overall layout suggests a comfortable, contemporary family residence with outdoor living spaces.
description: A two-story Mediterranean-style house with a terracotta gable roof, white walls, large glass windows, and a furnished front patio.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the glass-walled living area, main entry doors, and a curved outdoor seating area on a white patio.
description_view_1: The rear view shows the intersecting gable roofs, a small balcony, and fewer windows, emphasizing the building's depth.
description_view_2: This side view displays the long expanse of the terracotta roof, symmetrical window rows, and a secondary entry area.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the glass-walled section, patio furniture, and the overall L-shaped footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features double glass doors beneath a large window grid, with a flat overhang and adjacent patio seating.
